evidence_summary: Command feasibility improved while both candidates remained timeout_low_progress about 3.6 m from the goal.
Mean average speed changed by only +0.0047 m/s and late progress was slightly higher for the actuation-aware row; late-episode speed-cap binding is not separately instrumented.
Lower requested/applied speeds did not create a success-relevant progress loss in the tracked trace, but scoring conservativeness is not directly instrumented.
No deadlock or oscillation detector is present in the tracked trace.
